title: Chum Salmon Bycatch – Advocacy Opportunity
summary: As you know Chum salmon levels have been very low for Western Alaska, and the North Pacific Fishery Management Council (NPFMC) is now considering a cap on Chum salmon bycatch in the commercial pollock fishery. title: 2024 Photo Contest Winners
